All right, welcome back to legacy coaching. So now that you have a coach, who should you reach out to for the various things that you'll need? So number one, if you need help with your gym, okay, reach out to your coach. This can be done in your private Facebook group. It can be done by requesting a meeting on your weekly report, which will go over. You can send them a Facebook message. But anything that has to do with your gym, as an example, you need more leads, you want to improve your retention. You need help converting challengers over to EFT, anything like that, anything that has to do with your gym. That is exactly why you have a coach. So reach out to your coach. Now, number two, if you need tech support help, like fixing a pixel or a problem with one of your zaps not firing or your click funnels or spreadsheets not populating, anything that has to do with your tech setup, reach out to tech support. Okay, this can be done using intercom, which is the chat feature in the portal, or you can message Facebook or post it on the legacy page and they'll route you over to tech support. So make sure if it's a tech issue that you're reaching out to tech support. Number three, if you need to change your billing info, like your credit card was lost, or you got to you have to change it or update it or something like that, reach out to billing. And this can be done using intercom as well. So you can easily log into the portal, hit the little chat button in the bottom right hand corner and type in hey I need to update my credit card or something like that. Don't reach out to your coach for that kind of stuff. Don't reach out to your coach for tech kind of stuff. They're just there to help you fix your gym. Okay, number four, if you're not happy with your coaching, if your coach isn't fulfilling or isn't doing what you were hoping for, let us know. Okay, this can be done on your monthly surveys. So we send those out to you along with your weekly coaching reports. We send those out to you guys every month and every week. All you have to do is just fill them out, right? Or you can reach out to gym launch intercom directly and we will get you to the right person. Okay, so that's the couple ways that you can reach out to us regarding your coach. So anything that is not specific to your class or coach, continue posting in the high ticket high value Facebook group, the gym launch Alliance group, or the gym legacy Facebook groups. Because this is where you're going to get the most feedback. This is where everybody is collectively. So that's still our preferred way of you reaching out or posting questions or anything like that. Because you'll have, you know, 400, 500, 600 gym owners able to help you and give you their opinion and maybe a perspective that you didn't think of before. So it's still the strongest place to post. But if you have things that are more specific than post into your specific group, like if it's something that has to do with just your membership style, but anything other than that, just follow the different reach out attempts that we covered in this video and you should be all good to go. Thank you.
